summary: Converge the packaged M4 oracle after one bounded failed clean-Sandbox run by classifying local Tauri IPC separately from provider egress and correcting the remaining deterministic UI, animation, and thumbnail races before any rerun.

decisions.topic: Application-boundary interpretation of zero unconfigured AI network requests
decisions.decision: Count and retain every renderer fetch or XMLHttpRequest observation, but classify Tauri ipc.localhost commands, same-origin requests, and an explicit allow-list of local schemes separately from external provider egress. Require zero external, unknown-scheme, or unparseable renderer requests, zero dropped observations, and zero ai_http_request commands whether observed through a patchable invoke bridge or protected-bridge renderer IPC; do not misreport ordinary Tauri menu-state IPC as provider network access.
decisions.rationale: The exact clean 6e8f601 Sandbox run reached the no-provider AI assertion and observed one POST to http://ipc.localhost/update_native_menu_state. Static trace confirmed this is Tauri's local invoke transport caused by the layout/menu-state synchronization when the AI rail opens, not an AI provider request. The prior scalar counter discarded the target and produced a false failure. Bounded sanitized observations preserve the evidence needed to distinguish these cases while unknown schemes, unparseable targets, overflow, and a protected-bridge ai_http_request still fail closed. The existing injected AiWorkbenchPanel transport test continues to prove that an unconfigured panel never constructs provider transport.

decisions.topic: Deterministic packaged M4 UI and render evidence
decisions.decision: Restrict packaged interactions to visible controls, activate activity rails idempotently and verify the visible dock heading, restore session-only AI tool consent after the History remount, assert the actual serialized play result at frame 52 and $t 0.51, and poll for at most five seconds for a thumbnail whose capturedAt is not older than the triggering render.
decisions.rationale: Broad pre-rerun audit found that hidden controls could be selected, a second AI rail click could close an already-open dock, History remounting revoked the intentionally session-only consent, Play advances once beyond the scrubbed frame, and asynchronous thumbnail persistence could expose stale-but-valid image data. These are deterministic oracle defects and lifecycle conditions, so they were corrected together before permitting one further exact clean-Sandbox run.

testEvidence.criterion: The injected packaged monitor must preserve enough sanitized evidence to distinguish local Tauri IPC from an external provider request and must fail closed on external traffic.
testEvidence.test: Execute the real injected monitor around one Tauri IPC POST, one same-origin GET, and one external HTTPS POST, then validate exact counts and classifications.

red.command: pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/scripts/m4-packaged-walkthrough.test.ts -t "classifies renderer transport" --reporter=dot --maxWorkers=1
red.outcome: RED: the prior monitor returned only rendererAttemptCount and had no rendererExternalAttemptCount or retained classification, so the assertion could not distinguish the local IPC from provider egress.

green.command: pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/scripts/m4-packaged-walkthrough.test.ts -t "classifies renderer transport" --reporter=dot --maxWorkers=1
green.outcome: GREEN: the injected monitor retained three sanitized observations with exact 3 total, 1 external, and 2 internal counts and classified the native-menu command as Tauri IPC.

testEvidence.criterion: All broad-audit corrections must converge in one bounded local pass before another clean-Sandbox attempt.
testEvidence.test: Run the three affected helper/verifier suites once, then run formatting and diff hygiene in parallel.

red.command: Initial combined local pass before narrowing the static M4 segment assertion
red.outcome: RED only because the static check searched the entire packaged runner and matched a legitimate pre-M4 baseline History interaction; 50 of 51 tests, TypeScript, and diff hygiene were otherwise green.

green.command: pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/scripts/m4-packaged-walkthrough.test.ts tests/scripts/m4-packaged-verifier.test.ts tests/scripts/packaged-desktop-evidence.test.ts --reporter=dot --maxWorkers=1; pnpm.cmd exec biome check <7 affected implementation/test files>; git diff --check
green.outcome: GREEN: all 3 files and 51 tests passed; Biome checked all 7 files with no fixes; diff hygiene passed.

testEvidence.criterion: A protected Tauri bridge and an unknown remote scheme must not create a retained no-provider false pass.
testEvidence.test: Present an ai_http_request as renderer-observed Tauri IPC with native invoke monitoring unavailable, execute the injected monitor against an FTP target, and tamper retained passed evidence with the disguised broker command.

red.command: pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/scripts/m4-packaged-walkthrough.test.ts tests/scripts/m4-packaged-verifier.test.ts -t "protected-bridge AI broker|classifies retained renderer|revalidates exact artifacts" --reporter=dot --maxWorkers=1
red.outcome: RED: all three falsifications failed their new assertions. The live validator accepted disguised ai_http_request IPC, the classifier reported FTP as local-scheme, and the retained verifier accepted the tampered broker command.

green.command: pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/scripts/m4-packaged-walkthrough.test.ts tests/scripts/m4-packaged-verifier.test.ts -t "protected-bridge AI broker|classifies retained renderer|revalidates exact artifacts" --reporter=dot --maxWorkers=1
green.outcome: GREEN: all 3 focused tests passed. Protected-bridge ai_http_request is rejected live and in retained evidence, and FTP is classified external-scheme with the external count incremented.

nearMisses.sought: Exact clean packaged M4 walkthrough on candidate 6e8f601
nearMisses.confirmation: The clean build, application launch, cube render, MCP journey, WebView port handling, current no-provider guidance, and semantic AI-panel targeting passed. The envelope then failed at the old scalar zero-renderer-request assertion because opening AI emitted exactly one local Tauri update_native_menu_state IPC request. Host cleanup completed. This run remains failed evidence and is not a packaged pass.

questions: No owner decision is required. Permit exactly one further clean M4-only Sandbox run only after this complete slice passes local gates and independent strict-zero review.
attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
